name: Akira Sendou
description: The ace of Ryonan High School who is considered one of the top players in Kanagawa. He is known to be an easygoing, carefree and optimistic person who usually doesn't take much of anything seriously but when it comes to basketball, he seems to enjoy accepting challenges, mostly on 1 on 1 game. (Source: Slam Dunk Fandom)

name: Fuchi
description: __Race:__ Human __Tao Attribute:__ Metal __Occupation:__ Asaemon __Affiliation:__ Yamada Clan __Rank:__ 9th Yamada Asaemon Fuchi is the 9th rank Asaemon in the Yamada Clan and was chosen to be [Tamiya Gantetsusai's](https://anilist.co/character/137264/Gantetsusai-Tamiya) assigned monitor. Fuchi is a rational thinker that has a good sense of judgement in situations and carries a no-nonsense view when it comes to matters that he deems are unscientific, pointless, and illogical. He has great pride

name: Hanabi Hyuuga
description: __Affiliations:__ Konoha __Height:__ 132 cm (4'4") - 170cm (5'6") Hanabi (meaning "fireworks") is Hinata's sister and the youngest daughter of the leader of the Hyūga clan, [Hiashi Hyuga](https://anilist.co/character/15039). She initially​ demonstrated more talent than Hinata at a young age, which led Hiashi to focus more attention on her training to rear her into the next heir of the clan. ~!Years later she leads Team 15, retaining her father's strict training and disciplining as her team's Jōn

name: Izumi Sena
description: Sena Izumi is an 18-year-old boy who just entered college. He is a major otaku, and is obsessed with Magical Girl LalaLulu. Izumi is very skinny, and extremely short for his age - making it easy to believe he is a girl. In fact, he meets love interest Ryouma while playing a bride to him in a television commercial. Izumi dislikes show business and, despite his family urging him to try acting, he ambitions to become a popular mangaka like Saotome Miyabi.

name: Jougo
description: __Grade:__ Special Grade Cursed Spirit Jogou is an unregistered special grade cursed spirit aligned with Mahito, Hanami, and Dagon. He was born of humanity's fear and negative association with volcanoes and other fire-related natural disasters. This resulted in a highly intelligent cursed spirit with massive levels of cursed energy even for a special grade. Jogou believes curses are the true humans and desires a world where his kind dominates the earth.

name: Jun Manjoume
description: Judai's rival, Jun is always wanting to defeat Judai. He despises Judai and wants to take the place as "King Of Games". His family is very rich and he was able to win several championship matches before he went to Duel Academy. Like Judai, he can see the duel monster spirits. In the anime, his Duel Monster spirits are the Ojama Trio (Ojama Black, Ojama Yellow and Ojama Green) while in the manga his duel monster spirit is Light and Darkness dragon.

name: Shiraishi
description: **Height**: 160 cm **Hair Color**: Strawberry Blonde **Eye Color**: Brown **Hobbies**: Studying **Occupation**: Class Representative Shiraishi is a beautiful, intelligent, and popular student among males and females. She's a stylish girl with long and lengthy strawberry blonde hair brown eyes. Her hair is described as the idol hairstyle. Shiraishi is responsible for her duty as the class representative. Due to her being a loner back in middle school, there are times when she's depressed whenever

name: Tooru
description: Tooru is a citizen of Morioh. During his high school years, he dated Yasuho and the two seem to have been very close. One year before the events of JoJolion, he broke up with her. He then became a part-time worker at TG University Hospital at an undisclosed date. ~!Tooru is later revealed to be the main antagonist of Part 8. name: Yuuya Tenjou
description: Yuuya Tenjou is the main protagonist of the series. Located in his grandfather's secret room, Yuuya came across a door leading to another world, Argena, where he gained his powers. Being able to go back and forth between Earth and Argena, Yuuya became extrodinary in both worlds.

name: Arrietty
description: A 14-year old borrower who lives with her parents under the floorboards of Shou's house.

name: Hiruzen Sarutobi
description: The Third Hokage is a former student of the First Hokage and Second Hokage. Because of his surname, Sarutobi, the First and Second called him "Saru". He is the father of Asuma Sarutobi and the grandfather of Konohamaru. The Third was called The Professor due to his vast knowledge of jutsu, purportedly knowing all the jutsu within Konoha, and also as the "God of Shinobi" due to his immense power.

name: Hit
description: Born over 1000 years ago, Hit has been an assassin for a long time. He is famous for his highly efficient work at his job as all of his past assassinations were successfully completed. His signature for completing each assignment is to kill the target in a single strike. ~!Hit is stoic and composed, constantly appearing emotionless and indifferent to most events. An expert in his craft, Hit shows great confidence and fortitude in any challenge presented before him. Hit also seems to be confident

name: Itsuki Koizumi
description: **Height:** 178 cm (5'10") **Occupation:** Student (grade 11), Vice Commander, ~!Esper!~ Itsuki is the last member to have joined the SOS Brigade, having been recruited by [Haruhi Suzumiya](https://anilist.co/character/251/Haruhi-Suzumiya) as a "mysterious transfer student". Itsuki is constantly smiling and always speaks in a formal and polite manner. He is also prone to giving long and detailed explanations, usually illustrated by exaggerated hand gestures. name: Kanon Nakagawa
description: __Height:__ 161 cm Kanon is the most popular teen idol around for her beauty and singing talents. She was also in Keima and Elsie's class but had not been in school because of her idol status. However, she returns one day. She is constantly worried about the acknowledgment of her existence by others; this fear was so extreme and demonstrated when she attacked Keima with a stun gun after he said that he did not know her. Kanon hopes that her song would "resound in everyone's hearts." ~!She become

name: Kei Takishima
description: Kei is always a smooth winner, he's rarely seen stressed out or concerned unless it involves Hikari in trouble. He likes to refer to Hikari as "Number Two," or "Miss Rank Two" which never fails to provoke her. He has the ability to remember anything he reads, including phone numbers. He excells at all subject from academics to athletics to martial arts. He usually prefers to do things on his own, until Hikari shows him how much fun it can be to work together with other people. He is first in 10t

name: Kosame Amagai
description: A mahou shoujo with healing powers. She can heal others by cutting her wrist and letting them drink her blood. ~!She received her stick from Hatchi, the admin of another mahou shoujo site, after being diagnosed with cancer.!~

name: Rin Onigawara
description: Leader of the Tenka Goken. Onigawara is known for being merciless and a prominent hater of men, causing many to quit the academy. However, she softens significantly after meeting Nomura, showing many signs of affection. When her father abandoned their family after having an affair, Onigawara had to deal with the mental backlash of her distraught mother. Because she resembled her father, her mother would call her “ugly” or “ the child of a demon” and would demand her to wear a demon’s mask whenev

name: Shun Ibusaki
description: Shun is presumably known his senior, Isshiki Satoshi better than anyone else as he was stayed much longer than the rest of the Polar Star Gang. Unlike his passionate room mates, Shun is very realistic on the terms and very serious upon making his style in perfection. Shun is also a quiet student who prefer speak only whenever is considered as crucial by many. It is also once claimed that he is a calculative chef whose choose to act wisely over hesitation.

name: Kongou
description: **Hardness:** Unknown Kongou is the teacher of the lustrous. He has a vast amount of knowledge and has the power to drive away the Lunarians with a single attack. Normally, Kongou is quiet and stoic. When he speaks, he is straightforward and concise. He only rarely displays emotions, but this is rumored to be because he is deliberately hiding them and that his face would be very easy to read otherwise. On the rare occasions where he shows humor, he is still as deadpan as ever. Kongou cares for t

name: Kurumi Nonaka
description: A Hero and the sister of Yuki Nonaka. She is also an Element Master. Kurumi is a petite, young girl who is surprisingly developed for her age. She has blue violet hair held up in a ponytail by a white scrunchy and yellow eyes like her sister. Her battle outfit tightly wraps around her slim figure and is the typical attire for female Heroes which is a navy blue leotard with a black collar and a white skirt. Kurumi chooses to wear short tights underneath and her limbs are covered by her Spirit Arm

name: Masaru Katou
description: Height: 192 cm Masaru Katou has a good personality; he loves to help people and easily cares for everyone. His parents are dead so he is responsible for his younger brother who he is fiercely protective of. Katou usually takes the position of being a leader because he has good authority, but is unable to hurt others which hinders his performance in the game of Gantz. Masaru Katou was Kei Kurono's childhood friend. They meet each other again the day they die because Katou was trying to help a dru

name: Megumi Sakura
description: Megumi Sakura is a Japanese teacher at Megurigaoka Private High School and the faculty adviser for the School Life Club. She is affectionately called "Megu-nee" by her students (rather than her preferred "Sakura-sensei"). Megumi is a kind, patient young woman, who cares more for her students than herself. She has a soft tone in her voice and generally a calm demeanor when around others. Despite being an adult, she is also very innocent and meek at times, as Yuki states that she doesn't have much

name: Najimi Ajimu
description: Najimi Ajimu, or Anshin'in as she prefers to be called, has existed for over 3 trillion years before the universe was even created, and 3,402,193,822,311 years by the time of the series. Unlike Pluses like Kurokami Medaka who see themselves above normals, or Minuses like Misogi Kumagawa who see themselves below normals, Anshin'in belongs to an ideology she calls "Not Equals". name: Patrasche
description: Subaru's Earth Dragon that he officially received from Crusch Karsten for his efforts in the Hakugei battle. Despite being of a species known for being feisty, Patrasche is extremely loyal to Subaru, as she is willing to put her life on the line for him.
